---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r}
library(reticulate)
use_condaenv("dsfs2", required = TRUE)
```


Type any R code in the chunk, for example:
```{r}
#install.packages("here")
library(here)
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
ruta <- here("main", "data", "processed", "imdb_with_sentiment.csv")

datos <- read.csv(ruta, sep = ",")

datos %>% glimpse()
```
```{r}

```
